name: CellExpansion
description: Expands a 2D nuclei label mask outward by up to a configurable number of pixels to generate matching cell and cytoplasm label masks. Input must be a grayscale nuclei label image (uint8, uint16, or uint32). Useful for downstream measurements such as granule counting.
command-line: python wrapper.py CYTOMINE_HOST CYTOMINE_PUBLIC_KEY CYTOMINE_PRIVATE_KEY CYTOMINE_ID_PROJECT CYTOMINE_ID_SOFTWARE MAX_PIXELS DISCARD_CELLS_WITHOUT_CYTOPLASM

inputs.name: Max pixels
inputs.description: Maximum number of pixels to expand outward from each nucleus boundary. Larger values cover more cytoplasm but may cause neighbouring cells to overlap.

inputs.name: Discard cells without Cytoplasm?
inputs.description: If true, nuclei that have no free background pixels within the expansion distance (e.g. tightly packed cells) are removed from the output so that nuclei and cytoplasm labels always match.
